Federal Interagency Committee

Date: May 16, 2019 Location: USFWS office, 160 Zillicoa Street, Asheville, NC 28801 828-258-3939

Remote access if needed:

Number: 877-626-3198 Passcode: 8186681

Agenda:

Federal Interagency Committee Agenda
10:00Welcome (Scott Lokken, FIC Chair)
10:05Response to Hurricane Florence (Mary Ellen Sault, National Geodetic Survey)
10:35Geospatial Data Availability in Response to Hurricane Florence (group)
11:00One-meter Land Cover Methods and Products (Nate Herold, NOAA)
11:30Round-table sharing of current work and GIS opportunities/issues/concerns
11:45FIC Executive Committee and plans for 2019-2020
12:00Group lunch for anyone interested in going to a nearby restaurant.
